message:
Merge PR #2298: fix(ci): bump bd to v0.57.0 + add test timeout to unbreak CI

Bumps CI bd dependency to v0.57.0, adds -timeout=10m flag to gotestsum,
and truncates subForLog to 128 bytes to prevent scanner buffer overflows
that caused CI hangs.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2298
Author: seanbearden

files.patch:
@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Test with Coverage
         run: |
           set -o pipefail
-          gotestsum --format testname --junitfile junit.xml -- -race -short -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
+          gotestsum --format testname --junitfile junit.xml -- -race -short -timeout=10m -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
 
       - name: Test Report
         if: always()
@@ -150,7 +150,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install beads (bd)
         if: steps.cache-beads-int.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
-        run: go install github.com/steveyegge/beads/cmd/bd@v0.56.1
+        run: go install github.com/steveyegge/beads/cmd/bd@v0.57.0
 
       - name: Install gotestsum
         run: go install gotest.tools/gotestsum@latest
